problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light may resolve Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
